summary: Mechanical formatting-only PR applying clang-format across 15 files in MSL math, game-mode, item, menu, and stage-related code. The changes normalized comment spacing, brace placement, indentation, include ordering, struct typedef formatting, enum indentation, and line wrapping without evidence of semantic edits.
what_changed: Ran clang-format over 15 files, with 129 added and 137 deleted lines according to the PR slice.
Normalized inline comment spacing, such as `// 0xBF000030` and Doxygen trailing comments changing from double-aligned spacing to clang-format's single-space style.
Wrapped long return expressions in `gm_17C0.c` and `gm_1832.c`, especially percentage-scale table lookups divided by `100.0F`.
Reformatted `AdventureStageEntry`, `AllstarStageEntry`, and `ClassicStageEntry` comments while preserving field names, offsets, and `STATIC_ASSERT` size checks.
Normalized include spacing/order in files such as `grpushon.c`, `grpushon.h`, and `itsonans.c`.
Reformatted item structs in `itCommonItems.h`, including `itsonansAttributes`, `itFushigibana_ItemVars`, and `itFushigibanaAttributes`, to use standard typedef brace spacing.
Reindented and brace-normalized item logic in `itfushigibana.c` and `itsonans.c`, including `if (...) {` style and long assignment wrapping.
Indented the `MenuKind` enum values in `mn/forward.h` under the enum body instead of leaving comments and constants at column zero.
Wrapped long function declarations such as `mnDiagram_GetAveragePlayerCount` across multiple lines.
smart_moves: Kept the PR narrowly scoped to clang-format output, making review and merge low-risk.
Allowed existing decomp evidence such as offset comments, `STATIC_ASSERT` checks, placeholder names, and percent-match comments to remain intact while standardizing layout.
Applied formatting consistently across both `.c` and `.h` files, reducing future noisy diffs when nearby code is edited.
Did not appear to rename symbols or alter control flow; the diff excerpt shows mechanical whitespace, wrapping, include grouping, and brace style only.
decomp_lessons: Run project formatting separately from semantic decomp changes so future matching PRs do not mix style churn with codegen-sensitive edits.
clang-format may wrap long expressions and declarations, so matching-sensitive code should rely on verified compiler output rather than visual line layout.
Offset comments, size assertions, and unknown-field names can survive formatting passes; use `STATIC_ASSERT` and offset comments as stable anchors even during style cleanup.
For item and game-mode work, expect clang-format to normalize brace placement and indentation in partially matched functions without necessarily affecting decompilation semantics.
Keep percent-match comments formatted as normal comments, e.g. `// 99.63%`, so they are readable and consistent with the rest of the codebase.
naming_conventions: Existing unknown/decomp-style names were preserved, including `gm_8017E664`, `gm_8018A188`, `lbl_803D7AC0`, `lbl_803D85F0`, and `lbl_803D9910`.

Struct typedef names in the excerpt remain domain-specific or partially inferred, such as `AdventureStageEntry`, `AllstarStageEntry`, `ClassicStageEntry`, `itsonansAttributes`, and `itFushigibanaAttributes`.
Unknown fields retain offset-like names such as `x60`, `x64`, `xDD4_itemVar`, `xDAC_itcmd_var0`, and `unk_14`; this PR did not attempt naming improvements.
Enum constants in `MenuKind` retain `MENU_KIND_*` naming, including explicit numeric assignments and offset comments.
Inferred fields keep explicit comments such as `/* inferred */`, with formatting normalized rather than removed.
assembly_or_matching_tactics: No new assembly matching tactic is documented in PR text or comments; evidence indicates a formatting-only cleanup.
The MSL math comments about `__logf_C0_bits` and `__logf_C1_bits` being stored as `u32` bit patterns for `lwz` codegen were preserved, but not introduced by this PR.
Existing percent-match markers in item functions such as `// 99.63%` and `// 99.04%` were retained and reformatted, indicating the PR respected in-progress matching annotations.
Static size checks such as `STATIC_ASSERT(sizeof(AdventureStageEntry) == 0x1A)` and `STATIC_ASSERT(sizeof(struct GameRules) == 0x18)` remained in place as layout guards.
review_feedback: No issue comments, review comments, or review records were present in the supplied PR context.
There is no explicit reviewer rationale beyond the title `Run clang-format`; conclusions about intent are limited to the mechanical diff.
follow_up_queries: PRs that mix clang-format output with semantic decomp changes and caused review friction
Formatting-only PRs affecting item files with percent-match comments
clang-format impact on include ordering in doldecomp/melee
Struct layout PRs preserving STATIC_ASSERT and offset comments during cleanup
MenuKind enum formatting or naming follow-up PRs
